RULING - THE COURT VACATED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AND RULED AS FOLLOWS : PLAINTIFFS NAUM FELDMAN AND SVETLANA RESETSKAYA'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE ORDER VOIDING FILING DUE TO NONPAYMENT OF PARTIAL PAYMENT BALANCE PURSUANT TO CCP 411.21(B) IS TAKEN OFF-CALENDAR AND SHOULD BE NOTICED IN DEPARTMENT 206. MINI-MINUTES FOR AUG-12-2011 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 301

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF DEC-23-2011 IS OFF CALENDAR, COMPLAINT STRICKEN. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
